revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Tsukiyomi-no-Miya (Naiku)]]
{{aimai}} {{125 Shrines of Ise}}

revision.comment: added [[Category:125 shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] using [[Help:Gadget-HotCat|HotCat]]
Moving from [[Category:125 shrines of Ise Grand Shrine]] to [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:New pages]] to [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding the pagename so I can so shrine stuff
Copying from [[Category:All disambiguation pages]] to [[Category:Unsorted disambiguation pages]][[Category:qq-{{subst:PAGENAME}}-qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] to [[Category:Unsorted disambiguation pages]][[Category:qq-{{subst:PAGENAME}}-qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Deprecated qq open]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Running a split because mass replace regex is the purpose of this category
removing the accumulated cruft that makes [[Special:ShortPages]] useless
Moving from [[Category:Disambiguations to be written]] to [[Category:Completed disambiguations]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)

Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)

Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)

Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Removing from [[Category:Short pages that need to be lengthened so that this properly works]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:500 shortest pages as of 03-29-2025]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: single‑shot reformat + ill→|12=draft + draft categories + iws + DEFAULTSORT + move HTML comments + meta‑cat check
Removing from [[Category:Pages without meta categories]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: mark page as missing translated-page template
Bot: remove invalid enwiki interwiki links
Bot: classify – no translation template or en interwikis
Bot: remove deleted category Completed disambiguations
Bot: note missing translated page template
Copying from [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "<!-- no {{translated page}} template found in history -->" to "<!-- no translated page template found in history -->"
Bot: add ja interwiki from backlink ILL template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: tag pages missing wikidata links
Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
Bot: mark foreign language page not connected to wikidata
Moving from [[Category:Foreign language page not connected to wikidata]] to [[Category:Missing wikidata]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tag page with no valid interwiki links
Bot: tag page with no valid interwiki links
tagging these short pages for more work
Text replacement - "[[Category:1000 shortest pages as of Nov 16, 2025]]" to "[[Category:1000 shortest pages as of Nov 16, 2025]][[Category:qq]]"
Text replacement - "{{Disambiguation}}" to "{{Disambiguation}}[[Category:Short pages to be excluded since they are disambiguations]]"
Removing from [[Category:1000 shortest pages as of Nov 16, 2025]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages without valid translation templates or en interwikis or ja interwikis]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages without translation templates]]" to "[[Category:qq]]"
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:qq]]
adding dummy category to make categories work

revision.text:
